---
title: A Model Investigation of Aerosol-Induced Changes in Boreal Winter Extratropical
  Circulation
pagetitle: 2011-12-1-Ming2011 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2011
author: Yi Ming, V. Ramaswamy and Gang Chen
venue: Journal of Climate
venue_cit: <i>Journal of Climate</i>, 24, 6077--6091, doi:10.1175/2011JCLI4111.1.
recommended_citation: 'Yi Ming, V. Ramaswamy and Gang Chen, 2011: A Model Investigation
  of Aerosol-Induced Changes in Boreal Winter Extratropical Circulation, <i>Journal
  of Climate</i>, 24, 6077--6091, doi:10.1175/2011JCLI4111.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2011JCLI4111.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# A Model Investigation of Aerosol-Induced Changes in Boreal Winter Extratropical Circulation

*Published in Journal of Climate, 2011*

**Recommended citation:** Yi Ming, V. Ramaswamy and Gang Chen, 2011: A Model Investigation of Aerosol-Induced Changes in Boreal Winter Extratropical Circulation, <i>Journal of Climate</i>, 24, 6077--6091, doi:10.1175/2011JCLI4111.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2011JCLI4111.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
